name: Planar Systems, Inc.
description: Planar Systems, Inc. is a global leader in visualization technology, specializing in the design and manufacturing of high-performance display solutions. Founded in 1983, the company provides a comprehensive portfolio of LED video walls, LCD video walls, large-format displays, and desktop monitors. Serving diverse markets such as broadcast, control rooms, digital signage, and government, Planar is recognized for its commitment to innovation, superior image quality, and reliability. Headquartered in Hillsboro, Oregon, the company delivers advanced display technology designed to meet the rigorous demands of professional environments and critical visualization applications worldwide.
